case_title: RANDEEP S BASSI VS. ANANYA PATTANAYAK

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Randeep S. Bassi Plaintiff/Respondent appears as Propria Persona.
No Appearance by Anaya Pattanayak Defendant/Appellant.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Randeep S. Bassi Plaintiff/Respondent is sworn.
Randeep S. Bassi, Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Cout informed plaintiff/respondent, Randeep S. Bassi that the Appeal will be dismissed - no appearance by the appellant.

Exhibits previously received from the Small Claism remains with the file.

Judge Pro tem David Fleisig, Clerk Jean Kong, Not Reported (D525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Judgment Entered
